parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor client
participant gateway
participant "developer-service" as dev_service
database "devs-db" as devs_db
control broker
participant "planning-service" as planning_service
database "planning-db" as planning_db

client -> gateway : POST dev
activate gateway
gateway -> dev_service : POST dev
activate dev_service
dev_service -> devs_db : persist
dev_service -> gateway : response 201
gateway -> client : 201
deactivate gateway
dev_service -> broker : emit DevCreated Event
deactivate dev_service
broker -> planning_service : consume Event
activate planning_service
planning_service -> planning_db : persist Dev
deactivate planning_service
@enduml
```
